summary: A platform-owned event trail makes agent work reviewable and gives policy enforcement a durable control point.

points.text: Separate the agent's private reasoning from the authoritative record of requested work, grants, tool effects and evidence. This improves reconstruction without treating generated chat as proof.
Trust tiers let routine, reversible work move quickly while concentrating human attention on sensitive, irreversible or weakly evidenced actions.
Independent gates and structured verdicts make escalation evidence-based instead of relying on the originating agent's confidence.
